title: Financial Research Agent Workflow

activity_steps.name: Initialize Trace
activity_steps.action: gen_trace_id() → wrap execution in trace('Financial research trace')

activity_steps.name: Plan Searches
activity_steps.notes: Produces 5–15 search terms: recent news, earnings calls, 10-K filings, analyst commentary, industry background

activity_steps.name: Perform Searches (parallel)
activity_steps.action: For each FinancialSearchItem → asyncio.create_task(_search(item)); gather via asyncio.as_completed
activity_steps.parallelism: All searches launched concurrently; results collected as they finish
activity_steps.notes: Tracks num_succeeded / num_failed; wrapped in custom_span('Search the web')

activity_steps.name: Execute Single Search
activity_steps.output: str summary (≤300 words) or None on exception
activity_steps.notes: Exception caught → returns None (contributes to num_failed count)

activity_steps.name: Write Report
sub_agents_as_tools: RiskAnalystAgent → tool 'risk_analysis' (competitive threats, regulatory, supply chain)
activity_steps.streaming: Streamed; printer updates every 5s: 'Planning report structure...', 'Writing sections...', 'Finalizing report...'

activity_steps.name: Verify Report
activity_steps.notes: Checks internal consistency, sourcing, unsupported claims

activity_steps.name: Output Results
activity_steps.action: Print markdown_report, follow_up_questions, verification to stdout
activity_steps.output: Console display: REPORT, FOLLOW UP QUESTIONS, VERIFICATION sections

branching_logic: In _perform_searches: each _search task → result is None (failed) or str (succeeded); both paths collected/counted
In _write_report: writer may or may not invoke fundamentals_tool / risk_tool (LLM decides based on need)
In _verify_report: VerificationResult.verified = True or False, issues string populated if problems found
data_models: AnalysisSummary: summary: str (shared by financials_agent and risk_agent)
FinancialReportData: short_summary: str, markdown_report: str, follow_up_questions: list[str]
agents_summary: FinancialPlannerAgent: o3-mini, structured output FinancialSearchPlan, generates 5-15 search queries
FinancialSearchAgent: gpt-5.4, WebSearchTool, returns ≤300 word summary per query
FundamentalsAnalystAgent: default model, AnalysisSummary output, key financial metrics analysis
RiskAnalystAgent: default model, AnalysisSummary output, risk/red-flag analysis
FinancialWriterAgent: gpt-5.4, FinancialReportData output, synthesizes report + calls specialist tools inline
VerificationAgent: gpt-5.4, VerificationResult output, audits report for consistency
key_relationships: FinancialResearchManager orchestrates all agents via code (not LLM handoffs)
writer_agent uses financials_agent and risk_agent as_tool (agents-as-tools pattern)
_summary_extractor bridges AnalysisSummary → plain string for writer consumption
All search tasks run concurrently via asyncio; report writing is streamed
Verification is final sequential step after report generation
important_notes: Pipeline is code-orchestrated (deterministic order). Parallelism only in search phase. Writer invokes specialist sub-agents as tools inline during streaming. Entire run is wrapped in OpenAI tracing span.
